case_number: Criminal Bail Application stands dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Application No.S-178 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of bail application 16-05-2019 Mr. Hadi Bux Bhatt, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, D.P.G.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicant under instructions does not press this Criminal Bail Application on the ground that an application of similar nature is already pending before this Court bearing No.S-527/2018. Accordingly, this Criminal Bail Application stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
